traits.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The curate has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

traits.name: Raise the Dead (1/Day)
entries: In a ritual that takes 8 hours, the curate touches a creature that has died within the past 7 days. That creature returns to life with 1 Hit Points. The curate can't revive a creature that died of old age.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The curate makes three Celestial Radiance attacks.

actions.name: Celestial Radiance
entries: *Melee or Ranged Attack Roll:* +7, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft. *Hit:* 18 (4d8) Radiant damage.

actions.name: Healer's Touch (2/Day)
entries: The curate touches another creature. That creature regains 13 (2d8 + 4) Hit Points.

traits.name: Amorphous
entries: The ooze can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

traits.name: Corrosive Form
entries: Whenever a creature hits the ooze with a melee attack, that creature takes 2 Acid damage.

actions.name: Pseudopod
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +3, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 10 (2d8 + 1) Acid damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: Ivlis makes three Chaos Blast attacks. She can replace one attack with a use of Sinister Command if available.

actions.name: Chaos Blast
entries: *Melee or Ranged Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. or range 60 ft. *Hit:* 7 (2d6) damage. Roll 1d4 to determine the damage type: 1, Acid; 2, Cold; 3, Fire; 4, Lightning.

actions.name: Sinister Command 5
entries: *Wisdom Saving Throw:* DC 12, one creature Ivlis can see within 60 feet. *Failure:* The target has the Charmed condition until the end of its next turn. While Charmed, the target has the Incapacitated condition.

traits.name: Quick Disguise
entries: Jacko spends 1 minute to disguise himself as a different Humanoid of approximately his height and weight. While Jacko is disguised, a creature that takes the Study action to inspect Jacko's appearance can make a DC 13 Intelligence (Investigation) check, discerning his disguise on a successful check.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: Jacko makes two Poison Dagger attacks.

actions.name: Poison Dagger
entries: *Melee or Ranged Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. *Hit:* 5 (1d4 + 3) Piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) Poison damage.

bonusActions.name: Cunning Action
entries: Jacko takes the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action.

name: Kuo-toa Marauder
senses: Darkvision 120 ft., Truesight 30 ft., passive Perception 14

traits.name: Amphibious
entries: The kuo-toa can breathe air and water.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the kuo-toa has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

actions.name: Brine Slicer
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 9 (2d6 + 2) Slashing damage.

bonusActions.name: Slippery
entries: The kuo-toa takes the Disengage action.

traits.name: Hold Breath
entries: The lizardfolk can hold its breath for 15 minutes.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The lizardfolk makes one Bite attack and one Bone Pike attack.

actions.name: Bite
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) Poison damage.

actions.name: Bone Pike
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 10 ft. *Hit:* 7 (1d10 + 2) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Poison Spit
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +4, range 60 ft. *Hit:* 12 (3d6 + 2) Poison damage.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: Narthus makes two attacks using Vile Mace or Fateful Bolt in any combination.

actions.name: Vile Mace
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 5 (1d6 + 2) Bludgeoning damage plus 3 (1d6) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Fateful Bolt
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +4, range 120 ft. *Hit:* 8 (1d12 + 2) Necrotic damage, and the next attack roll made against the target before the end of Narthus's next turn has Advantage.

actions.name: Rapier
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +5, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 7 (1d8 + 3) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Light Crossbow
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +5, range 80/320 ft. *Hit:* 7 (1d8 + 3) Piercing damage.

reactions.name: Parry
entries: Pral is hit with a melee attack roll while holding a weapon. {@actResponse Pral adds 2 to his AC against that attack, potentially causing the attack to miss.

actions.name: Needle Sword
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +6, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 6 (1d4 + 4) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Enchanting Bow
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +6, range 40/160 ft. *Hit:* 1 Piercing damage, and the target has the Charmed condition until the start of the sprite's next turn.

actions.name: Heart Sight
entries: *Charisma Saving Throw:* DC 10, one creature within 5 feet the sprite can see (Celestials, Fiends, Undead automatically fail the save). *Failure:* The sprite knows the target's emotions.

actions.name: Invisibility
entries: The sprite has the Invisible condition for 1 minute. This effect ends early immediately after the sprite makes an attack roll or deals damage, or if the sprite has the Incapacitated condition.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: Vinx makes two attacks, using Shortsword and Sling in any combination.

actions.name: Shortsword
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Sling
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +4, range 30/120 ft. *Hit:* 4 (1d4 + 2) Bludgeoning damage.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
entries: While in sunlight, the wight has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls.

actions.name: Multiattack
entries: The wight makes two attacks, using Necrotic Sword or Necrotic Bow in any combination. It can replace one attack with a use of Drink Life.

actions.name: Necrotic Sword
entries: *Melee Attack Roll:* +4, reach 5 ft. *Hit:* 6 (1d8 + 2) Slashing damage plus 4 (1d8) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Necrotic Bow
entries: *Ranged Attack Roll:* +4, range 150/600 ft. *Hit:* 6 (1d8 + 2) Piercing damage plus 4 (1d8) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Drink Life 5
entries: *Constitution Saving Throw:* DC 13, one creature within 5 feet. *Failure:* 6 (1d8 + 2) Necrotic damage, and the wight regains a number of Hit Points equal to the Necrotic damage taken.
